---
title: "Ernest Hartley Coleridge"
---

## Ernest Hartley Coleridge

**Dates:** (1846-19 Feb 1920)

### Description

literary critic and scholar, brother of Christabel Coleridge, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1891-2)

### Biography

[will]

### Letters

- Letter from April 18th 1885
- Letter from Feb 13th 1881
- Letter from Feb 1st [endorsed \'1872\']

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
